name: insurance claims processors handling 20–50 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims processors handling 20–50 claims/month, manual reconciliation causes delayed payments and increased operational costs. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual processing of claims adjustments and payment denials.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of claims adjustments and payment denials
